scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "BE,FE" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "cd frontend && npm run start"
scripts.dev:stop: lsof -ti:3001,4200 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Nothing to stop'
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
